fallbackFixtures.descriptionEntry:
17515
From zeldafreak007 (07/24/2008; 64KB)
All battle maps, all secret characters, One save on Beyond the Darkness and 2 other on Chapter 22

4114
From NeoDhaos (05/30/2004; 64KB)
All holy weapons, at last chapter and have all 3 battle maps unlocked.

4202
From NeoDhaos (06/07/2004; 64KB)
Completed game, have all devine weapons, all battle maps, all characters, all battle characters, everyone at level 20/20

11187
From Wachon (03/22/2006; 64KB)
Fire Emblem Fuuin no Tsurugi Save with all the characters modes unlocked

8090
From AjoraFlame (06/20/2005; 64KB)
First save at ending while second save at chapter 8.

5846
From RuruniX (01/10/2005; 64KB)
Last stage, good stats and character

27407
From Memo_rize (02/06/2021; 64KB)
[FOR RANKED RUNS - HHM UNLOCKED] Intentionally sabotaged rankings for each mode, so accurate battle history can be recorded when finishing a run. 100% supports, sound room/cgs, and bonus disk content!

3345
From ingo4 (01/26/2004; 64KB)
*Sharked Game Save* Awesome Items in inventory.

7812
From CharlieF (05/26/2005; 64KB)
100% Music, 100% Support, 100% Bonus Disk Items, Hard Modes Available

7800
From Gigashock (05/24/2005; 64KB)
100% Support

27572
From BOBdotEXE (05/28/2021; 32KB)
Blank save with Exclusive Extras! (Empty save with legit bonus content from the 'Mario Kart Double Dash' Bonus Disc. No cheats used!)

3790
From AjoraFlame (04/24/2004; 64KB)
Eliwood's last stage. Kent (paladin) is level 20 with S in lance. A lot of characters have changed class, but a few characters are dead.

3236
From FF_TLSOK (12/05/2003; 64KB)
Final Chapter

3237
From FF_TLSOK (01/07/2004; 64KB)
Final Chapter: Light.

10530
From Wachon (01/09/2006; 64KB)
Fire Emblem Save with all the characters and all the modes unlocked

3238
From Relle (01/08/2004; 64KB)
Saved at the final chapter of Eliwood's story.  Many characters promoted and equipped with great weapons.

4435
From AjoraFlame (07/03/2004; 64KB)
Two slots. First at final battle. Second after final battle with suport conversions. Hector and Guy are promoted at Level 20 and is now level 20 after promoting. Karel and Karla are in the troop.

7752
From AjoraFlame (05/16/2005; 64KB)
100% Support Unlocked!

12863
From Wachon (08/26/2006; 64KB)
All characters unlocked. All in lvl 20. One Save at the choice of Eirika or Ephraim in normal mode.

9531
From Sangogi (10/14/2005; 64KB)
All support conversations. All characters unlocked. All in lvl 20. Great Stats. One Save at the choice of Eirika or Ephraim.

11485
From code2004 (04/16/2006; 64KB)
At Chapter 11, Seth is REALLY strong (Lv20). About 10,000G. Eirika is lv13.

10248
From hdo (12/12/2005; 64KB)
Completed all missions. All high levels, no characters dead. No cheats used.

27399
From Memo_rize (01/31/2021; 64KB)
Creature campaign ready file. 250,000+ gold and legendary weapons. All characters base classes, need to get post game characters. 100% support log and sound room. Bonus content enabled in English!!

24608
From DS977 (04/03/2016; 64KB)
Creature Campaign started, all character have base class, level, stats, proficiency, gear and support. Seth has a stupidly high number of combats. Was cheated, but then all cheat effects were removed.

8000
From AjoraFlame (06/10/2005; 64KB)
Creature Campaign. Three Maxed Stats Swordsmasters. About 290k of gold and legendary items are in good condition with an unused hammerne. Tower and Ruin finished once.

9568
From iamverydead (10/18/2005; 64KB)
First file with Seth dead!

7999
From AjoraFlame (06/10/2005; 64KB)
First save, Eirika on world map, going to chapter 11. Marisa, a level 20/20 assassin.

7737
From Mykas0 (05/15/2005; 64KB)
Game saved before chapter 9, Eirika's route.

7814
From scopelenz (05/27/2005; 64KB)
Just before Eirika Chapter 8. High Franz status and good Eirika status. Nobody died yet. For people who want to get a head start. Lots of good items

7753
From AjoraFlame (05/16/2005; 64KB)
Sound Room 95% Unlocked!
